title: paeonia spontanea
intro: Paeonia spontanea, also known as Chinese peony, is a species of flowering plant in the peony family. It has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and antiseptic effects. The plant has been used to treat various health conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and skin irritations, and its health benefits also include promoting relaxation and reducing stress. Paeonia spontanea is commonly used in herbal preparations, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, and is often combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
